The Codex

Archive of Expeditions

A chronicle of territories explored, instruments built, and problems pursued. Each entry is a sustained engagement — recorded here for those who follow the same routes.

✦

2024 – Present

Expedition I — The Cognition Engine

An ongoing survey of uncharted terrain at the intersection of machine cognition and collaborative sense-making. The expedition produced three working prototypes and a published field report.

AI/MLResearchPythonHCI
Read Dispatch →

2023 – 2024

Expedition II — Social Architecture

A cartographic project mapping the social architecture of nascent communities. Produced field guides, frameworks, and a small constellation of tools still in active use.

CommunityProductTypeScript
Read Dispatch →

2022 – 2023

Expedition III — Sparse Signal

Deep reconnaissance into systems that learn from sparse signals. The resulting instruments have since been adopted by several downstream expeditions.

SystemsDataRustML
Read Dispatch →

2021 – 2022

Expedition IV — The Infrastructure Layer

A foundational survey establishing the underlying terrain for everything that followed. Not glamorous; essential. Built the roads that later expeditions walked.

InfrastructureDevOpsGo
Read Dispatch →

Summer 2023

Research Fellowship — Institute Name

A concentrated season of deep work at a selective research fellowship. Produced two position papers and one working prototype. Relationships formed here continue to shape the work.

ResearchFellowshipWriting
Read Dispatch →

2022 – Present

Open Source — Toolkit Name

A small but useful library for a narrow problem that turned out to be more common than anticipated. Maintained by a loose coalition of contributors across four time zones.

Open SourceTypeScript
Read Dispatch →
